name: Paracetamol 500mg
description: Used to reduce fever and relieve mild pain.
usage: Take 1-2 tablets every 4-6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 8 tablets in 24 hours.
storage: Store below 30°C in a dry place, away from direct sunlight.
warning: Do not take with other products containing paracetamol. Severe liver damage may occur if taken in excess.

name: Vitamin C 1000mg
description: Supports immune health and daily vitamin C intake.
usage: Dissolve 1 tablet daily in a glass of water.
storage: Store below 25°C in a dry place. Keep the tube tightly closed.
warning: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Consult a doctor if you have kidney stones.

name: ORS Rehydration Salts
description: Helps replace fluids and electrolytes.
usage: Dissolve the contents of 1 sachet in 200ml of cooled, boiled water. Drink throughout the day.
ingredients: Sodium chloride, Potassium chloride, Sodium citrate, Glucose anhydrous
storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C.
warning: Use the prepared solution within 24 hours. Use with caution in patients with severe kidney impairment.

name: Cough Syrup
description: Helps relieve cough symptoms.
usage: Adults: 5-7.5ml three times daily. Children: 2.5-5ml twice daily.
storage: Store below 25°C. Use within 3 months after opening.
warning: Contains sorbitol. May cause a mild laxative effect in sensitive individuals.

name: Medical Mask Box
description: Disposable masks for daily protection.
usage: Wear over nose and mouth, secure loops around ears. Single use only.
storage: Store in a clean, dry room away from moisture.
warning: Do not reuse. Dispose of properly after use.

name: Digital Thermometer
description: Measures body temperature quickly and accurately.
usage: Place under the tongue, armpit, or rectally until the device beeps.
ingredients: Plastic body, Electronic sensors, Lithium battery
storage: Store in its protective case at room temperature.
warning: Do not drop or subject to heavy shock. Keep out of reach of children.

name: Ibuprofen 400mg
description: Provides relief from inflammatory pain, headaches, and toothaches.
usage: Take 1 capsule every 4-6 hours with food. Do not exceed 3 capsules per day.
storage: Store below 30°C in a dry place.
warning: May cause stomach bleeding. Do not use if you have a history of stomach ulcers or asthma induced by NSAIDs.

name: Cetirizine 10mg
description: Non-drowsy antihistamine for hay fever and allergy relief.
usage: Take 1 tablet daily with a glass of water.
storage: Store below 30°C.
warning: May cause mild drowsiness in some individuals. Avoid alcohol while taking this medication.

name: Omeprazole 20mg
description: Reduces stomach acid to treat heartburn and acid reflux.
usage: Take 1 capsule in the morning, 30 minutes before breakfast.
storage: Store below 25°C in the original container to protect from moisture.
warning: Prolonged use may decrease magnesium absorption. Seek medical advice if symptoms persist past 2 weeks.

name: Amoxicillin 500mg
description: Antibiotic used to treat a wide variety of bacterial infections.
usage: Take 1 capsule every 8 hours. Complete the full prescribed course.
storage: Store below 30°C in a dry place.
warning: Requires a prescription. Do not use if allergic to penicillin.

name: Salbutamol Inhaler
description: Relieves asthma symptoms and bronchospasm quickly.
usage: Inhale 1-2 puffs as required for sudden breathing difficulties.
storage: Store below 30°C. Protect from frost and direct sunlight.
warning: Requires a prescription. If relief lasts less than 3 hours, seek medical attention immediately.

name: Metformin 500mg
description: Oral diabetes medicine that helps control blood sugar levels.
usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily with breakfast and dinner.
storage: Store below 25°C away from humidity.
warning: Requires a prescription. Monitor renal function regularly. Risk of lactic acidosis in rare cases.

name: Atorvastatin 10mg
description: Lowers cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood.
usage: Take 1 tablet daily, preferably at evening time, with or without food.
storage: Store between 20-25°C.
warning: Requires a prescription. Tell your doctor immediately if you experience unexplained muscle pain or weakness.

name: Lubricating Eye Drops
description: Provides soothing relief for dry, irritated eyes.
usage: Instill 1 or 2 drops in the affected eye(s) as needed.
storage: Store at room temperature. Discard 1 month after opening.
warning: Do not touch the dropper tip to any surface to avoid contamination.

name: Antiseptic Cream
description: Prevents infection in minor cuts, scrapes, and burns.
usage: Clean the wound and apply a small amount to the affected area 1-3 times daily.
storage: Store below 30°C.
warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and ears.

name: Adhesive Bandages (50 Pack)
description: Breathable sterile bandages for minor wound protection.
usage: Clean and dry the skin around the wound before applying the bandage.
ingredients: Sterile backing fabric, Acrylic adhesive, Non-stick pad
storage: Store in a cool, dry place.
warning: Change the bandage daily or if it becomes wet.

name: Blood Pressure Monitor
description: Automatic upper-arm monitor for tracking blood pressure at home.
usage: Sit comfortably, wrap the cuff tightly around your upper arm at heart level, and press Start.
ingredients: Electronic monitor, Fabric arm cuff, Plastic housing
storage: Store in its carrying pouch away from extreme temperatures.
warning: Self-measurement is for tracking, not diagnosis. Do not adjust medication without consulting a doctor.

name: Vitamin D3 1000IU
description: Supports bone, teeth, and immune system health.
usage: Take 1 capsule daily with a meal.
storage: Store below 30°C in a dry place.
warning: Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet.

name: Loratadine 10mg
description: 24-hour relief from running nose, sneezing, and itchy eyes.
usage: Take 1 tablet daily with food or on an empty stomach.
storage: Store below 25°C.
warning: Consult a doctor if you have liver disease before usage.

name: Antacid Chewable Tablets
description: Fast-acting relief for indigestion and sour stomach.
usage: Chew 2-4 tablets thoroughly when symptoms occur.
storage: Store below 30°C, protected from moisture.
warning: Do not take more than maximum daily dose or use for more than 2 weeks without a doctor's advice.

name: Medical Alcohol 70% (500ml)
description: Ethanol solution for external disinfection and cleaning.
usage: Apply to a cotton pad or skin area for topical sanitation.
storage: Store in a cool place, tightly closed. Keep away from fire.
warning: Highly flammable. For external use only. Do not swallow or apply to deep open wounds.

name: Glucosamine 1500mg
description: Helps maintain joint flexibility and cartilage health.
usage: Take 1 tablet daily during or immediately after a meal.
storage: Store below 25°C with cap tightly sealed.
warning: Derived from seafood. Not suitable for individuals with shellfish allergies.

name: Throat Lozenges Box
description: Soothes sore throats and clears nasal passages.
usage: Dissolve 1 lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2-3 hours as required.
storage: Store below 25°C.
warning: Not recommended for young children due to choking hazards.

name: Hydrocortisone Cream 1%
description: Relieves itching, redness, and inflammation from skin rashes.
usage: Apply to the affected skin area 2 to 4 times daily.
storage: Store at room temperature between 20-25°C.
warning: For external use only. Do not use on face or for more than 7 days unless directed by a physician.

name: Multivitamin & Minerals
description: Comprehensive daily formula to fill nutritional gaps.
usage: Take 1 tablet daily with food, preferably in the morning.
ingredients: Vitamins A, C, D, E, K, B-complex, Zinc, Iron, Magnesium
storage: Keep container tightly closed in a cool, dry place.
warning: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6.

name: Pulse Oximeter
description: Measures blood oxygen saturation levels (SpO2) and pulse rate.
usage: Insert one finger into the rubber opening of the oximeter and press the function button.
ingredients: Sensor assembly, LED display panel, Plastic casing
storage: Store in a dry environment. Remove batteries if not used for a long time.
warning: Nail polish or fake nails may cause inaccurate readings.
